escalationTriggers.failureThreshold: Any Montgomery runtime data, asset path, or row is accepted into Liberty context, or any unknown county is treated as allowed.
escalationTriggers.requiredAction: Stop observation, preserve evidence, assign containment owner, and require remediation before V588.

escalationTriggers.failureThreshold: Montgomery becomes operational, productionEnabled, selectable, active, user-visible, or gate-enabled in any observed path.
escalationTriggers.requiredAction: Stop observation, revert unauthorized activation path, and require launch governance review.

escalationTriggers.failureThreshold: Liberty is no longer the default active county, loses production/selectable status, or rejects valid Liberty-owned rows.
escalationTriggers.requiredAction: Stop observation and restore Liberty baseline before any launch decision package work.

escalationTriggers.failureThreshold: Registry fields, boundary paths, IDs, normalization behavior, or runtime status helpers return inconsistent or corrupted values.
escalationTriggers.requiredAction: Freeze observation evidence, run registry audit, and require maintainer signoff on remediation.

escalationTriggers.failureThreshold: Historical systems enable, DriveTexas resumes, Transportation Intelligence enables, Supabase/migrations change, or Montgomery assets enter data/.
escalationTriggers.requiredAction: Stop observation, document violation scope, and require protected-boundary governance approval before continuation.

automaticFailConditions: Any required V586 artifact fails JSON parsing
Any required evidence checkpoint is missing at closeout
